summary: Iteration 12 testing complete - All 5 polish fixes verified. UserAvatar component working in all views (Sidebar, TitleBar, TableView, MessagesView, WalkieView). Read receipts showing 'Sent'/'Read' under outgoing messages. ShareItemModal drag highlight (blue border) and file selected state (green checkmark + filename) working. Upload URL fixed to /api/upload. Two-tone walkie beep implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: UserAvatar.jsx correctly renders when avatar_url exists, falls back to .avatar div with initials
ShareItemModal.jsx uses correct upload URL: ${API}/api/upload and file URL: ${API}/api/files/
ShareItemModal drag states: dragOver shows blue border (var(--mac-blue)), fileSelected shows green border (var(--mac-green)) with CheckCircle icon
Read receipts implemented in TableView.jsx and MessagesView.jsx - shows 'Read' or 'Sent' based on m.read field
WalkieView.jsx beep function plays two tones: freq at t=0 and freq*1.25 at t=dur+0.05
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 complete. All 5 polish fixes verified: 1) Two-tone walkie beep (plays freq and freq*1.25), 2) Drag-and-drop visual highlight (blue border on drag, green checkmark when file selected), 3) UserAvatar component used in Sidebar, TitleBar, TableView, MessagesView, WalkieView - renders img when avatar_url exists, initials fallback otherwise, 4) Read receipts ('Sent'/'Read') under outgoing messages in TableView chat and MessagesView, 5) Fixed upload URL to /api/upload and file URL to /api/files/. Admin user has initials avatar (no avatar_url set), but 'Updated Name' user has DiceBear avatar image.

user_avatar_component.walkie_view_online_members: UserAvatar for all online members, DiceBear img for 'Updated Name'

share_item_modal.drag_over_highlight: Blue dashed border (var(--mac-blue)) + light blue background
share_item_modal.file_selected_state: Green dashed border (var(--mac-green)) + CheckCircle icon + filename displayed

walkie_two_tone_beep.implementation: beep() function plays two tones at freq and freq*1.25

regression.navigation: All pages load (Portal, Calendar, Messages, Walkie, Call History, Apps, Contacts)
regression.tables: 3 tables visible (Family Circle, Test Bible Study, Phase4 Test Study)
